business_type: freelance branding consultant for early-stage SaaS
weekly_tasks_text: I run discovery calls with 2-3 new leads each week, write proposals based on those calls, scope visual identity projects, send invoices monthly to about 5 active clients, manage a project board with deliverables and feedback rounds, write a weekly newsletter to 500 subs, post 2 LinkedIn updates each week, and review portfolio updates from a part-time designer I subcontract.
current_tools_text: Notion for project management, Stripe for invoicing, Figma for visual work, ConvertKit for the newsletter, LinkedIn, Gmail for client comms, Calendly for scheduling, Loom for client video updates.
top_time_sinks_text: Writing proposals from scratch each time takes me 2-3 hours and they're all structurally similar. Following up on stale leads is something I forget. Project status updates to clients are repetitive but they expect them weekly.
error_sensitive_areas_text: Anything that goes to the client directly: invoices, proposals, scope documents, design deliverables. Newsletter sends. Anything visible to the public on LinkedIn.
customer_facing_areas_text: Discovery calls, all written client comms, proposals, scope agreements, invoices, design reviews, weekly newsletter, LinkedIn posts.
primary_goal_text: I want to reclaim 5 to 8 hours per week of admin time and reinvest it into strategy work for higher-margin clients, or into building a small productized offering I can sell repeatedly.
things_owner_refuses_to_automate_text: Direct client communication. The relationship is the product. I'm fine if AI helps me draft, but I always send the final message myself.
